name: Kathmandu
description: Capital district with a strong mix of crafts, services, and tourism.

name: Lalitpur
description: Known for Newar art, heritage craftsmanship, and creative industries.

name: Bhaktapur
description: Heritage city famous for pottery, yogurt, and traditional artisanship.

name: Kavrepalanchok
description: Hill district with agriculture, dairy, and growing roadside trade.

name: Sindhupalchok
description: Mountain district known for herbs, hydropower support, and trading routes.

name: Dolakha
description: Highland district with tourism, mountain agriculture, and medicinal herbs.

name: Ramechhap
description: Agricultural hill district with fruit production and livestock farming.

name: Sindhuli
description: Fruit-growing district with a strong hill agriculture base.

name: Makwanpur
description: Strategic district linking hills and plains with diversified agriculture.

name: Chitwan
description: National park district known for poultry, honey, and eco-tourism.

name: Nuwakot
description: Hill district with strong vegetable and dairy production.

name: Dhading
description: Agriculture-focused district with roadside trade and livestock.

name: Rasuwa
description: Border district with mountain tourism and cross-border trade potential.

name: Kaski
description: Home to Pokhara, a major tourism hub with growing specialty coffee exports.

name: Gorkha
description: Historic hill district with tourism, spices, and rural agriculture.

name: Lamjung
description: Mid-hill district known for coffee, honey, and scenic village tourism.

name: Manang
description: High-altitude district famous for trekking, yak products, and mountain herbs.

name: Mustang
description: Famous for high-altitude organic apples and rare medicinal herbs.

name: Myagdi
description: Mountain district with a strong herbal trade and adventure tourism.

name: Baglung
description: Hill district with horticulture, agriculture, and tourism corridors.

name: Parbat
description: Mid-hill district with coffee, vegetable farming, and scenic trade routes.

name: Syangja
description: Known for citrus orchards, coffee, and mid-hill agricultural trade.

name: Tanahun
description: Important hill district with agriculture and service-sector growth.

name: Ilam
description: The tea capital of Nepal, producing world-class Himalayan orthodox tea.

name: Jhapa
description: Eastern agricultural district and gateway to India.

name: Morang
description: One of Nepal's oldest industrial districts with diverse manufacturing.

name: Sunsari
description: Industrial and agricultural district with major trade links.

name: Dhankuta
description: Hill district known for citrus fruit and spice production.

name: Bhojpur
description: Eastern hill district with tea, fiber, and terrace farming.

name: Khotang
description: Mountain district with coffee, oranges, and herbal products.

name: Solukhumbu
description: Everest district with trekking tourism and high-altitude products.

name: Okhaldhunga
description: Hill district with growing coffee and spice agriculture.

name: Sankhuwasabha
description: Remote mountain district with cardamom and eco-tourism potential.

name: Terhathum
description: Hill district known for tea gardens and citrus orchards.

name: Taplejung
description: Mountain district with large cardamom and trekking destinations.

name: Udayapur
description: Hill-plains district with agriculture and industrial manufacturing.

name: Panchthar
description: Tea-growing hill district with spices and dairy products.

name: Dhanusha
description: Cultural and agricultural district with strong Mithila heritage.

name: Mahottari
description: Fertile Tarai district with staple crops and vegetable trade.

name: Bara
description: Industrial Tarai district with sugar production and trade logistics.

name: Parsa
description: Border district centered on commerce, textile trade, and logistics.

name: Rautahat
description: Agricultural district with banana production and market gardening.

name: Saptari
description: Tarai district with fisheries, rice, and oilseed cultivation.

name: Siraha
description: Agricultural district with sugarcane, rice, and livestock products.

name: Sarlahi
description: Fertile plains district known for cash crops and food production.

name: Rupandehi
description: Industrial powerhouse and home to Lumbini, the birthplace of Buddha.

name: Kapilvastu
description: Historic Tarai district with agriculture and Buddhist heritage tourism.

name: Nawalparasi East
description: Eastern Nawalparasi district with agriculture and lakeside tourism.

name: Nawalparasi West
description: Western Nawalparasi district with trade, sugar, and market agriculture.

name: Dang
description: Valley district known for mixed agriculture and food production.

name: Banke
description: A key trading hub in the west with significant forest-based industries.

name: Bardiya
description: Western Tarai district known for rice fields and wildlife tourism.

name: Arghakhanchi
description: Hill district with spice cultivation and livestock production.

name: Gulmi
description: Hill district known for tea, coffee, and citrus farming.

name: Palpa
description: Historic hill district with handicrafts, coffee, and tourism.

name: Pyuthan
description: Mountain-valley district with agricultural production and trade.

name: Rolpa
description: Remote hill district with herbs, honey, and rural agriculture.

name: Rukum East
description: Eastern Rukum district with mountain agriculture and eco-tourism.

name: Surkhet
description: Provincial hub of Karnali with agriculture and services growth.

name: Dailekh
description: Mountain district with herbs, spices, and subsistence agriculture.

name: Jajarkot
description: Remote district known for herbs and traditional mountain farming.

name: Salyan
description: Hill district with ginger production and mixed farming.

name: Rukum West
description: Western Rukum district with herbs and small-scale rural production.

name: Jumla
description: High-altitude district famous for apples and the indigenous Marshi rice.

name: Mugu
description: Remote mountain district with herbs and wilderness tourism.

name: Humla
description: Northern mountain district with herb collection and historic trade routes.

name: Dolpa
description: Remote trans-Himalayan district known for herbs and trekking routes.

name: Kalikot
description: Mountain district with herbs, maize, and rugged terrace farming.

name: Kailali
description: Large Tarai district with rice fields, fisheries, and dairy products.

name: Kanchanpur
description: Far-western plains district with agriculture and wildlife tourism.

name: Doti
description: Hill district known for traditional grains, ginger, and herbs.

name: Achham
description: Mountain district with medicinal herbs and resilient subsistence farming.

name: Bajura
description: Remote hill district with herbs, grains, and small livestock trade.

name: Bajhang
description: Mountain district with high-altitude agriculture and herb collection.

name: Darchula
description: Border mountain district with herbs, trekking, and cross-border trade.

name: Baitadi
description: Hill district with ginger, traditional grains, and herbal products.

name: Dadeldhura
description: Hill district with coffee, citrus fruits, and herbal agriculture.
